name: CleanMyMac Purchase Flow
goal: Complete the purchase flow: go through plan selection, sign up with email and password, and reach the payment/checkout page. Fill in fake card details to capture the payment form UI but do not submit payment.

steps.label: Pricing Page
steps.description: CleanMyMac subscription pricing page showing annual plans for 1, 2, or 5 Macs with the 1 Mac plan selected.
steps.title: Choose the right CleanMyMac subscription plan

next_action.description: Click the Buy Now button to proceed with the 1 Mac annual plan purchase

steps.label: Payment Form
steps.description: A checkout page showing order summary for CleanMyMac with email address and country input fields before payment.
steps.title: Choose the right CleanMyMac subscription plan

next_action.description: Filling in the email address field with the disposable email

steps.label: Payment Form
steps.description: Order summary checkout page showing CleanMyMac subscription details with email and country fields filled in, ready to proceed to payment.
steps.title: Choose the right CleanMyMac subscription plan

next_action.description: Click Continue button to proceed to the payment card details form

steps.label: Payment Form
steps.description: A checkout page with order summary showing PLN 112.31 for CleanMyMac 1-year plan, with PayPal and credit card payment options.
steps.title: Choose the right CleanMyMac subscription plan

next_action.description: Payment form has been reached. Goal is complete - stopping before submitting any payment.
